full_text:
Ma Zhong (Dexin) 馬忠 (德信)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ma Zhong (馬忠), styledDexin (德信). Served Shu notably during the northern and southern campaigns. Ma Zhong was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Ma Zhong lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
